checkin.journal:
Feeling tired after the long day - and driving really is not comfortable on the front seat - I feel I get to suffer so much sun radiation there - I also think I got this after this hot cold treatments - just made it worse - saunas are never making any good thing for me, its completely possible it was some reaction of temp and textile, or plants in lake and reaction to sun
Had some spikes a little bit, also feeling thr acid a little bit in the evening - peobably I built this over several days
